name: P90 | 星辰巨蟒
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. A silver and blue pattern depicting Jörmungandr, the World Serpent, has been applied. Wake the gods
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，用银色与蓝色图案描绘了耶加梦得——世界之蛇。 惊醒众神
